blocks.content: Davenport called back nine minutes later.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: The paint scrape is recent. Someone put their weight on it going up. The porch roof gives you a landing — from the window ledge it's eight feet, maybe less. Manageable for someone who came prepared.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: You're saying someone climbed in through that window.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: I'm saying someone went in and out through that window while Marcus was unconscious. The door was never the way in. The window is why they left it open — couldn't close it cleanly from outside while climbing down. They left it and let the cold air work for them. Confuses the time of death. Sends everyone looking at the wrong thing.
Silence on the line. Long enough that Julian could hear Davenport thinking.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: The booking. Who reserved this house.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: That's the right question. Whoever did this chose this property specifically. They knew what that window offered before they arrived.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: I'll get forensics on the bracket tonight.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: Don't let them come through the front. The group is watching everything.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: Mr. Crane. How certain are you.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: Certain enough that I'm not sleeping until the tox comes back.
